page.title: Keep your clients informed
page.subtitle: Send automatic notifications via SMS, email, WhatsApp and push. Payment alerts, service outages, promotions and more — all from one place.

multichannel.title: Integrated multichannel
multichannel.description: Send notifications via SMS, email, WhatsApp and push notifications. Ideal for managing all your client communications from a single panel.

automaticAlerts.title: Automatic alerts
automaticAlerts.description: Configure rules to send alerts for due dates, service outages, reconnection and payments received automatically.

customTemplates.title: Customizable templates
customTemplates.description: Create and customize message templates with dynamic variables such as name, amount and due date.

deliveryReports.title: Delivery reports
deliveryReports.description: Monitor open rates, successful deliveries and failures per channel. Optimize your communication with real data.

channels.sectionSubtitle: Reach your clients through their preferred channel. Configure each one independently.

sms.title: SMS
sms.description: Direct text messages to the client's mobile phone. Ideal for payment alerts and service outages.

email.title: Email
email.description: Send invoices, receipts and communications with personalized HTML templates and your brand.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Direct messages via WhatsApp Business API. The channel with the highest read rate among your clients.

push.title: Push notifications
push.description: Instant notifications in the browser or mobile app. Perfect for real-time alerts.

ctaSection.title: Automate communication with your clients
ctaSection.subtitle: Configure smart notifications and reduce support calls by up to 60%.
